name: Hot Chile Pepper Twists ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dough ingredients except cilantro in a bowl.
2. Program the bread machine for knead and first rise.
3. Set a kitchen timer to go off 10 minutes before the end of the machine's second kneading cycle.
4. Check the dough when the timer goes off and adjust with flour or water if needed.
5. Add the cilantro.
6. While the dough is rising, prepare the filling.
7. When the dough is ready, transfer it to a lightly greased work surface.
8. Divide the dough in half. Working with one half at a time, roll it into a 15 x 10-inch rectangle.
9. Transfer the rectangle to a lightly greased cookie sheet.
10. Visually divide the rectangle into thirds, each measuring 10 x 5 inches.
11. Working on the middle third of the dough and leaving 1 inch of space at each end, layer half the beans, half the olives, half the chilies, half the salsa, and then half the cheese.
12. Using a rolling pizza wheel or a sharp knife, make 6 evenly spaced 5-inch long cuts in the dough, cutting from the edge of one side of the unfilled sides to where the filling starts. Repeat with the other unfilled side.
13. Fold the small piece of dough at each end of the filling, tucking them underneath the dough on the opposite side. Repeat the entire process with the other piece of dough.
14. Tent the twists with lightly greased plastic wrap and set aside to rise for 1 hour, or until they are noticeably puffy.
15. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
16. Bake the twists for 30 minutes.
17. Remove the twists from the oven, transfer them to a wire rack, and allow them to cool for 10 minutes before cutting.
